signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI: Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY (up from 2.0%, below 2.3-2.4% consensus)** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2]

South Korea's Statistics Korea released March 2026 consumer price data today, confirming annual inflation rose to 2.2% from 2.0% in February (and 2% in January), driven by oil prices amid Middle East tensions, but tempered by government fuel caps and vouchers—monthly ri
